prompt: A Soviet Constructivist propaganda poster, 1920s. Three distinct groups of geometric worker silhouettes — flat, no shading, no gradients. Each group a single bold color: red, black, dark grey. Each group leans toward a bold geometric centroid symbol. Figures simplified to pure geometric shapes. Strong diagonal composition. Aged cream background. Bold black frame elements. Red bar at bottom. Flat color throughout. Style: El Lissitzky, Rodchenko. --no gradients, photorealism, soft shading, organic forms, digital effects
tradition_approach: Flat unmodulated color per cluster, diagonal compositional tension, geometric worker figures, bold centroid markers, limited red-black-cream palette — all grammar devices of Rodchenko and El Lissitzky.
